final_decision.exact_quote: If you encounter an issue where a merchant has refused to accept your Visa card on the basis that the merchant requires a minimum or maximum amount on a Visa debit card, or requires that the purchase amount on a credit card is greater than US\$10, please notify your Visa card issuer.
final_decision.response: In the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit card transactions. This is an exception that applies in the USA and US territories. If you encounter issues with a merchant requiring a minimum amount on a Visa debit card or a credit card purchase greater than US$10, you should notify your Visa card issuer.
